description: System / native runtime components bundled in or invoked by the Docker image (Debian trixie apt packages + the PlantUML jar + the base image). Hand-curated from the §10b.2 setup determinations; the license gate does not introspect apt/OCI layers, so this file is the reviewed source of truth for their obligations. purl/source URLs are the corresponding-source pointers for the copyleft components.

components.name: PlantUML
components.exposure: redistributed in image (unmodified jar); invoked arm's-length (java -jar)
components.obligation: GPLv3 §6 corresponding-source offer: the bundled jar is the unmodified official binary; its complete corresponding source is the tagged release above (and the plantuml-1.2026.3 sources jar on Maven Central). Arm's-length invocation (separate process) keeps this project's own MIT-licensed code unaffected (GPLv3 §5 aggregation).

components.name: OpenJDK (openjdk-21-jre-headless via default-jre-headless)
components.obligation: The GPLv2 Classpath Exception is designed for running independent programs on the JRE; ship the license notice. Corresponding source available from Debian and openjdk.org.

components.name: Graphviz
components.exposure: bundled + invoked (PlantUML shells out to dot); unmodified
components.obligation: EPL-1.0 (weak copyleft, file-level): unmodified, so ship the notice + point at upstream source. No project source becomes EPL.

components.name: git
components.exposure: invoked arm's-length (separate process) for repository sync
components.obligation: Aggregation / arm's-length invocation — no linking into project code. Ship notice; corresponding source from Debian.

components.name: ca-certificates
components.obligation: MPL-2.0 (file-level weak copyleft), unmodified; ship notice + upstream pointer.

components.name: fonts-dejavu-core
components.exposure: bundled; rendered into diagrams by PlantUML/Graphviz
components.obligation: Permissive with attribution; ship the font license notice.

components.name: python:3.13-slim-trixie (runtime base image)
components.exposure: redistributed as the image base layer
components.obligation: Debian main is DFSG-free (no non-free packages pulled); ship the aggregate notice. Build-only images (node:20-alpine, ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.13-trixie-slim) are NOT shipped (multi-stage) and are out of redistribution scope.
